nasb.text: Now then, let my lord send to his servants wheat and barley, oil and wine, of which he has spoken.

esv.text: Now therefore the wheat and barley, oil and wine, of which my lord has spoken, let him send to his servants.

cnv.text: 我主所說的小麥、大麥、酒和油，請派人運來給眾僕人。

ccb.text: 现在，请我主把许诺的小麦、大麦、油和酒运给仆人。
